name: an-introduction-to-agent-foundation
description: Agent-readable, education-focused foundation template for environment, wiki, MCP, skills, and verified workflows.

scripts.test: npm run validate && node scripts/doctor.mjs --json --quiet && node scripts/verify-mcp.mjs --config templates/wiki-project/.mcp.example.json --workspace . && node scripts/verify-skill.mjs --id tw-edu-exam-generator && node scripts/verify-pages.mjs --workflow .github/workflows/pages.yml --site site
